description_long: This object is a compact analog synthesizer keyboard, reminiscent of the classic Moog Minimoog, featuring a wooden chassis with a natural finish and a black control panel. The front panel is equipped with numerous rotary knobs, switches, and labeled sections for sound shaping, as well as a set of white and black piano keys for musical input. The control panel is angled for ergonomic access and is adorned with a prominent 'moog' logo. The rear side is plain, with a few visible ports or connectors, likely for audio and power connections. The side panels are solid wood, giving the instrument a sturdy and vintage appearance. This synthesizer is designed for tabletop use and is commonly found in music studios, performance venues, or creative urban spaces.
description: A vintage-style analog synthesizer keyboard with a wooden frame, black control panel, and multiple knobs and keys. The design is compact, ergonomic, and visually striking with a classic 'moog' logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, control panel with knobs and switches, and the 'moog' logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled control panel and the depth of the wooden chassis.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel with minimal visible connectors and the 'moog' logo.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the keyboard and the arrangement of the control panel.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, rotary dials, switches, keyboard keys
